query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total!" FROM pcp.produto_ativo
           WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR classe = $1)
             AND ($2::text IS NULL OR status = $2)
             AND ($3::text IS NULL OR codigo_estoque ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
                  OR produto ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%' OR sku ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%')
